messages.content:
I'll start by loading the execution-trace skill as required before doing anything else.







Now I'll analyze the lab report PDF from the provided URL using the BloomCell clinical framework and generate the structured highlight data.

Based on the downloaded PDF (Document_2.pdf) analyzed through the BloomCell report-analyzer framework, here is the structured output:





✅ Document `2f92a8a6-51d0-40fa-827b-0c3033f5c54d` updated successfully in Cosmos DB (`PatientDocument`) with 8 BloomCell highlight analysis objects across all 4 groups.

traceEvents.toolResult: INIT | Loading execution-trace skill before all operations

  "expected_outcome": "Skill instructions for analyzing lab reports and producing structured JSON highlight output.",

}

  "plugin": "report-analyzer",

  "status": "todo"
}

{

  "step": 3,
  "plugin": "cosmos_update_document",
  "plugin_type": "mcp",
  "reasoning": "I have analyzed the lab report PDF and generated 8 highlight objects per the BloomCell framework. Now I will merge them into the original payload as highlightData and call cosmos_update_document with id=2f92a8a6-51d0-40fa-827b-0c3033f5c54d and partitionKey=PatientDocument.",
  "expected_outcome": "Successful update of the Cosmos DB document with the new highlightData field appended to the original payload.",
  "status": "todo"
}

{
  "type": "reflection",
  "step": 4,
  "plugin": "cosmos_update_document",
  "plugin_type": "mcp",
  "result_summary": "Cosmos DB document 2f92a8a6-51d0-40fa-827b-0c3033f5c54d updated successfully with statusCode 200. The highlightData array of 8 objects was stored correctly.",
  "insight": "All 8 BloomCell highlight objects were persisted to the PatientDocument partition. The update timestamp was set to 2026-06-04T12:53:12Z. No errors encountered.",
